'''zasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quakily|quakily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quakily|quakily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || zasate
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || zasatesher
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || zasatesherëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || zasatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || zasateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || zasateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokizasatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokizasateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokizasateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gozasankerom
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozasankeshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozasankeshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gozasankeya
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || zasaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || zasatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || zasateya
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokizasaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokizasatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokizasateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || zasasate
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || zasasatesher
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || zasasatesherëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || zasasatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || zasasateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || zasasateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokizasasatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokizasasateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokizasasateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gozasasankerom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozasasankeshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozasasankeshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gozasasankeya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || zasasaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || zasasatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || zasasateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokizasasaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokizasasatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokizasasateya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || zæsæte
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || zæsætesher
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || zæsætesherëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || zæsætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || zæsæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || zæsæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokizæsætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokizæsæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokizæsæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gozæsænkerom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozæsænkeshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozæsænkeshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gozæsænkeya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || zæsæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || zæsætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || zæsæteya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokizæsæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokizæsætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokizæsæteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || zafsafte
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || zafsaftesher
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || zafsaftesherëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || zafsaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || zafsafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || zafsafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokizafsaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokizafsafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokizafsafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gozafsafnkerom
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozafsafnkeshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozafsafnkeshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gozafsafnkeya
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || zafsafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || zafsaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || zafsafteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokizafsafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokizafsaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokizafsafteya
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
